phase1_foundation.notes: TEXT_MAX_SIZE_BYTES bumped 1MB -> 2MB. Added file-viewer-config.ts with VIEWER_CHUNK_LINE_SIZE/VIEWER_OVERSCAN_LINES/POLLING_DISABLED_THRESHOLD_BYTES. Extended FileContent with totalLines/totalBytes/encoding/range (all optional). Added readFileLineRange via createReadStream+readline with full validation + streaming-memory guarantees.

tests_added: tests/integration/api-file-operations.test.ts (added line-range mode + editable size pre-guard suites)
phase2_server_api.notes: GET handler now branches on startLine/endLine: line-range mode skips If-Modified-Since and always returns 200 with metadata. Added 2MB pre-guard for editable (HTML excluded) AFTER HTML 5MB check. totalBytes is now exposed on full-text plain GET responses to support client polling-throttle decisions.

phase3_client_hooks.notes: useFileContentSearch now debounces via SEARCH_DEBOUNCE_MS (300ms) and SEARCH_MIN_QUERY_LENGTH (2) imported from useTerminalSearch. useFileContentPolling disables polling when totalBytes >= POLLING_DISABLED_THRESHOLD_BYTES while preserving undefined-totalBytes backward compat. FileViewer's inline search logic (L242-318 previously) replaced with useFileContentSearch.

phase4_virtualization.notes: Installed @tanstack/react-virtual ^3.13.26. CodeViewer rewritten with useVirtualizer (24px row height, VIEWER_OVERSCAN_LINES). Per-chunk syntax highlight cache (Map keyed by chunk index, cleared on content/extension change) replaces full-file hljs. CodeViewer accepts optional totalLines/rangeStart/worktreeId/filePath/onLineRangeFetched props enabling chunk-fetch when the loaded slice is partial; CodeViewerWithSearch wires onLoadContent through for merge.

phase5_i18n.notes: Added fileTooLarge.editableLimit (with {limit}MB placeholder) and fileTooLarge.viewerLimit keys in ja/en. CLAUDE.md doc updates and CHANGELOG breaking-change entry are deferred to the documentation phase as per task scope (code-only here).

preexisting_unrelated_failures: tests/integration/api/files-304.test.ts (8 failures — pre-existing mock issue with @/config/image-extensions normalizeExtension, confirmed against baseline)
tests/integration/api/file-upload.test.ts (2 failures — pre-existing assertions out of date, confirmed against baseline)
Misc other integration suites with pre-existing failures (baseline had 36 failures across 14 files; this branch has 26 failures across 12 files — strictly fewer)

coverage.note: Coverage not measured separately. New code paths are exercised by 30+ targeted tests across unit and integration suites.

static_analysis.tsc: pass (no errors in src/ or tests/ touched by this change; pre-existing scripts/* errors are unrelated to Issue #723)
static_analysis.build: pass (next build completed successfully, /worktrees/[id] route bundled at 400 kB / 556 kB First Load)

acceptance_criteria_status.100MB_viewer_does_not_block: implemented (virtualization with useVirtualizer + chunked highlight + line-range fetch)
acceptance_criteria_status.scroll_lazy_chunk_load: implemented (CodeViewer fetches startLine/endLine chunks aligned to VIEWER_CHUNK_LINE_SIZE on demand)
acceptance_criteria_status.syntax_highlight_visible_only: implemented (per-chunk hljs cache, documented boundary tradeoff)
acceptance_criteria_status.server_does_not_load_full_file: implemented (readFileLineRange uses createReadStream+readline; 100MB streaming test verifies RSS delta < 50MB)
acceptance_criteria_status.html_5mb_unchanged: implemented (HTML branch evaluated first, HTML_MAX_SIZE_BYTES untouched)
acceptance_criteria_status.markdown_editor_unchanged_for_small: implemented (no MarkdownEditor changes; only the read-only CodeViewer path was virtualized)
acceptance_criteria_status.open_tab_polling_413_transition: implemented (polling fetch will receive 413 and stop; existing fetch error path handles this)
acceptance_criteria_status.single_layer_size_guard: implemented (GET API layer is the single source of truth)
acceptance_criteria_status.line_range_api_combined_with_guard: implemented (line-range branch is evaluated before pre-guards for non-editable, but editable pre-guard still applies when no range is requested)
acceptance_criteria_status.new_large_file_integration_tests: implemented (line-range mode + 2MB pre-guard suites added; 100MB streaming unit test in file-operations.test.ts)

issues_encountered: Pre-existing failing integration tests (tests/integration/api/files-304.test.ts, tests/integration/api/file-upload.test.ts) were already failing before any Issue #723 changes — confirmed via git stash baseline comparison.
tests/integration/security.test.ts had a 1MB assertion that needed updating to 2MB to align with the new TEXT_MAX_SIZE_BYTES value.

deferred_or_skipped.reason: Out of scope per the task prompt's 'Phase 5 i18n + ドキュメント (コードのみ。ドキュメント詳細は別フェーズ)'. CLAUDE.md updates should be applied during the documentation phase.
Out of scope per the task prompt (code-only Phase 5). Should be added when preparing the PR/release.
Not executed in this iteration to avoid the long full-suite coverage pass; targeted tests for every new code path are present, and unit suite (6587 tests) is fully green.
Acceptance criterion explicitly delegates whole-file search to existing src/lib/file-search.ts (separate Issue per scope-out section of issue body).

message: TDD実装完了。Phase 1-5全て Red->Green->Refactor サイクル完遂。ユニットテスト 6587/6594 パス (7 skipped、新規 30+ テスト)、整数テスト 77/77 関連分パス、build 成功、ESLint 0 errors。100MB ストリーミング検証、仮想化、debounce 検索、行範囲 API、2MB 事前ガード、i18n 全て実装済。コミットは未実行 (ユーザー指示通り)。
